name: Average Rating
prompt: What is the average movie rating?

name: Highest Rating
prompt: What is the highest movie rating?

name: Lowest Rating
prompt: What is the lowest movie rating?

name: Award Winners
prompt: How many award winning movies are there?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evalmovies WHERE is_award_winner = true;

name: Average Actor Age
prompt: What is the average actor age?

name: Average License Cost
prompt: What is the average license cost?

name: Total Views
prompt: How many total views were recorded in the last 30 days?

name: Movies After 2015
prompt: How many movies were released after 2015?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evalmovies WHERE "Released Date" >= '2016-01-01';

name: Netflix Movies
prompt: How many movies are available on Netflix?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evalmovies WHERE streaming_platform='Netflix';

name: Movies By Genre
prompt: Count the number of movies in each genre.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT "Genre", COUNT(*) FROM evalmovies GROUP BY "Genre" ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

name: Average Rating By Genre
prompt: What is the average rating for each genre?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT "Genre", ROUND(AVG("Rating"),2) FROM evalmovies GROUP BY "Genre" ORDER BY 2 DESC;

name: Movies Per Platform
ground_truth_sql: SELECT streaming_platform, COUNT(*) FROM evalmovies GROUP BY streaming_platform ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

name: Top Rated Movies
prompt: Show the top five highest rated movies.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT "Movie Title", "Rating" FROM evalmovies ORDER BY "Rating" DESC LIMIT 5;

name: Most Viewed Movies
prompt: Show the five most viewed movies.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT "Movie Title", views_last_30d FROM evalmovies ORDER BY views_last_30d DESC LIMIT 5;
